name: brightbox-commerce
description: An e-commerce operations team managing order fulfillment from placement through delivery.

resources.name: Operations Director
resources.description: Owns end-to-end fulfillment performance, carrier relationships, and SLA commitments.

resources.name: Order Manager
resources.description: Processes incoming orders, validates payments, and coordinates with the warehouse on priority queues.

resources.name: Warehouse Lead
resources.description: Directs pick-and-pack operations, manages inventory accuracy, and oversees outbound shipments.

resources.name: Customer Support Lead
resources.description: Handles delivery inquiries, manages returns, and resolves post-shipment exceptions.

resources.name: Order Fulfillment
resources.description: Workflow from order placement through final delivery confirmation.

resources.name: Receive Order
resources.description: Ingest the order, validate line items, and confirm inventory availability.

resources.name: Pick & Pack
resources.description: Retrieve items from warehouse locations, verify quantities, and package for shipment.

resources.name: Ship
resources.description: Generate shipping labels, hand off to the carrier, and update order status with tracking.

resources.name: Confirm Delivery
resources.description: Verify carrier confirmation, close the order, and trigger the post-purchase follow-up.

resources.name: Payment Verification
resources.description: Confirm payment authorization and flag held or declined transactions for review.

resources.name: Inventory Management
resources.description: Maintain real-time stock counts, trigger replenishment, and audit cycle counts.

resources.name: Returns Processing
resources.description: Receive returned items, inspect condition, issue refunds or exchanges, and restock.

resources.name: SLA Monitoring
resources.description: Track fulfillment cycle times against committed service levels and escalate exceptions.
